headline: Truist Securities Reiterates Buy on Packaging Corp of America, Lowers Price Target to $258
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Roxland   reiterates Packaging Corp of America (NYSE:PKG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $260 to $258.
